overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person drive across the Golden Gate Bridge (Gant Bridge) on a clear sunny day. The vehicle travels south toward the city, with the camera panning left to reveal panoramic views of the San Francisco skyline, Alcatraz Island, and the Marin Headlands.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge roadway approaching main tower

agents.ego_description: driving straight along the bridge deck toward the south tower at steady speed

entered.detail: iconic red-orange suspension bridge tower with art deco detailing dominating the forward view
thick red vertical suspension cables running along the left side of the roadway
thick red vertical suspension cables running along the right side of the roadway
red curved street light poles lining the left side of the bridge deck
red curved street light poles lining the right side of the bridge deck
metal safety railing with diagonal cross pattern along the left sidewalk
distant city buildings visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a smooth drive along the Golden Gate Bridge approaching the south tower. The roadway is empty, with red suspension cables and street lights framing the view. The iconic orange tower grows larger in the center of the frame while the distant San Francisco skyline is barely visible to the left across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge roadway with panoramic city view

events.description: camera begins panning left to reveal the San Francisco skyline across the bay

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive south while looking left toward the downtown skyline and waterfront

entered.detail: small rocky island with prison building visible in the middle of the bay

changed.to: right_near only as camera turns left
left_mid becoming more prominent and detailed

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle continues across the bridge, the camera pans left away from the tower to showcase the San Francisco skyline. The city buildings come into clear view across the blue water, with Alcatraz Island appearing in the center distance. The bridge cables shift to the right side of the frame as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge viewpoint overlooking San Francisco Bay

agents.ego_description: driving along the bridge with view focused on Alcatraz Island and the expanse of the bay

entered.detail: green rolling hills of the Marin peninsula visible in the distance to the right

changed.to: center_mid becoming larger and more detailed
left_far becoming smaller as camera pans further left

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning left to center on Alcatraz Island sitting in the middle of the sparkling blue bay. The San Francisco skyline recedes to the left while the green Marin Headlands appear on the right horizon. The bridge railing remains visible in the foreground as the vehicle progresses along the empty roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach with view of Marin County

events.description: view shifts from cityscape to Marin headlands and northern bridge structure

agents.ego_description: completing the leftward pan to view the Marin hills and northern bridge cables while continuing to drive

entered.detail: northern suspension tower partially visible at the edge of the frame

changed.to: left_near re-entering the frame as camera pans toward the north side
center_far becoming the primary focal point

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing its leftward rotation to face the Marin Headlands. The San Francisco skyline and Alcatraz exit the frame, replaced by the northern bridge tower and suspension cables entering from the left. The vehicle continues driving through the empty bridge span with expansive views of the blue water and green hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive across the bridge that transitions from a focused approach toward the city skyline into a wide panoramic sweep of the surrounding bay and headlands. It begins with a smooth journey along the empty roadway, where the iconic orange south tower grows larger in the center of the frame against a distant, hazy skyline. As the vehicle progresses, the camera pans left away from the tower to bring the San Francisco skyline and Alcatraz Island into clear view across the sparkling blue water. The perspective then shifts further left, centering on Alcatraz while the city recedes and the green Marin Headlands emerge on the right horizon. Finally, the rotation completes as the skyline and island exit the frame, replaced by the northern bridge tower and suspension cables overlooking the expansive blue water and rolling green hills.
